label: Initial five-case benchmark execution plan
purpose: Freeze the first executable benchmark batch before running model comparisons, so later outputs can be audited against predeclared cases, prompts, review criteria, and release guards.

model_families.target: GPT-5.5 Pro or current ChatGPT Pro Deep Research-equivalent reviewer available to the operator
Codex-style implementation and validation reviewer available in the repo workflow

model_plan.randomization: Run order should be randomized or rotated by case and arm before execution. Store actual order in run records.
model_plan.operator_notes: Do not summarize across arms until raw outputs are saved. Do not let one arm inspect another arm's answer before its own run is complete.

review_plan.blinding: Hide arm labels from reviewers where practical. If blinding is not possible because full_ofone artifacts are obvious, record that limitation in the review notes.

independent_review_launch.browser_surface: Computer Use on authenticated Chrome session
launch_proof: Deep Research plan title visible: Independent OfOne Batch 01 Review

independent_review_harvest.visible_report_metadata: Research completed in 13m; 15 citations; 5 searches; 17 May; 15 sources
independent_review_harvest.adjudication: direct_answer accepted; light_structured accepted; full_ofone rejected from aggregate scoring

implemented_changes: pre-score compliance gate with auto-reject semantics
immutable validator and patch artifact capture
excluded-run log and matrix state semantics
independent_review_integration.blocker_state: critical Run 06 workflow blockers implemented locally; broader Batch 01 remains in_progress until more predeclared slots run

release_guard.reason: Batch 01 is still in progress. Run 06 rejected one first-slice full_ofone slot from aggregate scoring, and the suite remains far below the declared superiority-claim minimum.
release_guard.allowed_claim: Batch 01 has 45 completed and locally reviewed predeclared run slots, one independent review, one excluded original run, and one remedial replacement; no performance comparison is supported.
